title: lupinus superbus var. elongatus
intro: Lupinus superbus var. elongatus, also known as the tall lupine, is a perennial flowering plant species native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lupinus superbus var. elongatus include alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Lupinus superbus var. elongatus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, with the root and leaf being used in herbal remedies, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal preparation.
